item.title: Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 192)
item.description:
Welcome to the 192nd edition in this series, let's do some good today. Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them https://imgur.com/gallery/Cg6iteN Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 181-190) https://imgur.com/a/g3sTR0J Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 171-180) https://imgur.com/a/7OnodoA Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 161-170) https://imgur.com/a/3SfMNfg Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 151-160) https://imgur.com/a/a3npRvx Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 100-150) https://imgur.com/a/rdkioD9 Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (First 100 days) https://imgur.com/a/SGVY2vD
If you can't fight the fear Do it scared.
Replace the child and wife with the 3 cutest dogs in the world and this is me.
@DidYouCheckIt being wholesome on the outernet
If you love otters, check out the gallery of @sixtoedjesus
｡◕‿◕｡
Never quit looking for your reason. .... If anyone would like to help the Humane Association continue rescuing animals like Nanna, check out my link below. The fundraiser has stalled a bit, hoping to get it going again https://www.classy.org/fundraiser/3793511 ... Have a beautiful day everyone, see you soon
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: Clearing phone dump #1
item.description:
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Did you know canaries were used in mines to smell out toxic gas? Edit: As pointed out this is not correct. They fell unconscious quicker so if it fell down it was time to get out.
.
You can hear this picture right?
.
.
.
.
...
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Butt
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
It is random dump
.
.
.
.
.
Mood
.
Mood
.
True
.
.
.
You have come to the end of my cleaning phone dump. Hope you enjoyed your stay. Will there be 2nd one? And will it be themed next time? Dunno. Have a lovely day. Edit: Frontpage deserves a speach. Thanks. The end

item.title: That's fair.
item.description: You do you, Bugs.
item.dc:creator: AgentKGB

item.title: Oops! All suspicious memes v51
item.description:
Good news! I’m slowly dissolving into a weird level of depression and I don’t feel like doing anything at all! So this may be the last one of these. As a reward for sticking with me this far, at the end I will tell you the story of the worst person I’ve ever met. EDIT: redacted bc I felt guilty
Facts
Do men even want virgins? My husband says no. I’d be offended but tbh I don’t want to sleep with any virgins either.
Smh modern men need to step up their game (this is from a thread about objecting to weddings)
(This is the plot to Jane Eyre just FYI)
It’s shocking how few people hold to this rule. So many men give 0 shits that I’m married.
Flashbacks to showing my mom how to use her phone *shudder*
Husband sent me this. I’m horrified.
Aliens wait plz come back
Sugar just fixes everything in my life I don’t see a problem
Don’t ever google parenting shit. There is no science. Only stupidity.
…..they hirin?
It’s actually very possible that it is caused obliquely by the Iraq war
I’m around panel 3 and it do be like that
It does though. It really really does. I look around at my life all the time and I can’t believe that two people who wanted to die and couldn’t even get out of bed could build an entire life and create a child together. It’s only been 7 years since I found my favorite medication but it was like my life began that day. Don’t give up. And NEVER SKIP YOUR MEDS TRUST ME YOU WILL DEFINITELY NOT LIKE IT
This made me laugh so hard. PS: don’t do 23&me and commit crimes. They can use your distant cousins to track you down. Family doesn’t let family do genetic testing!
I’ve seen it a million times but it’s always true. Wtf Padme.
Me on May 4
My parents scoffed at my writing career. Now I have an agent and an eating disorder and yeah they aren’t seeing a dime of that money
Just watched that movie last night. So good. If anyone tells you it’s transphobic they are lying.
And if you run out of walls. Buy more walls.
I’m autistic as fuck and everyone hates me, if anything imma be the murderer
My hero
Not me, apparently I run a catch and release program for people afflicted with Penis, and they all go on to do great without me.
Well….I didn’t get an air fryer…..
I would love to be homies!!!
I fell in a parking lot and sprained my toe this weekend and no one even cares. I’m so old.
Ironically this looks exactly like my old coworker who once told me that my husband was DEFINITELY cheating on me with his friends who were mean to me because, allegedly, them being mean was a sign of jealousy and men are incapable of having female friends.
That doesn’t seem like enough money
Oh well. Writing is fun. Do whatever you want.
To be fair you’d need to be making 100k a month to afford 6 warhammer kits
I ship it
I will always reblog cowboy tips. Not because I’m a Texan. But because they’re lessons Texans seem to have forgotten. Buncha dumbasses in politics here
My lame ass husband had never seen this one
Lots of incel memes like this one have been popping up in meme dumps. And I’m here to tell you: if you think women hate good guys, you aren’t a good guy, and that’s why they don’t like you. Source: am woman, ergo I am a way more reliable source than this asshole
This is really really funny if you know anything about Civilization
The mom is like “no I didn’t I mean sure w/e yeah ur grounded”
Fuck anything over 4/4. I said what I said. 6/4 is just 3/4 with extra steps.
Solution: we need more gods
That is probably why you are lost
My baby just leaned peekaboo and it’s hella cute. He is also trying to clap.
Also MLK rewrote the I have a dream speech a bunch of times and was still working on it when he was called up on stage and just fuckin threw out his notes and winged it. Turns out all that procrastinating helped the ideas marinate in his brain and the pressure helped him focus. ADHDers, rejoice.
Yepppp
This is even funnier the deeper we get into the year
Daaaaaaaamn
EDIT: story was redacted bc I had an anxiety attack that somehow friend would see the story about her SO and be upset
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: SO IMPORTANT--
item.description: If you have seen me before, you know I spam my GoFundMe I created for my family. You know I feel no shame about it. Without sharing my GoFundMe I never would have had a very helpful human send me this video! I HAD TWO hospital bills FORGIVEN. Two of them. 100% poof, gone. Now, it did not work for the SECONDARY hospital though, because, they arent in the same county as where I live (I'll fight that as much as I can). BUT this saved us over $10,000. I am so grateful. Here is a link to my gofundme. PLEASE SHARE THIS and do not forget to read updates! The very first update has a YouTube video where the diagnosis was given and the MRI was looked over. https://gofund.me/0919cb33
item.dc:creator: Kikiray

item.title: Cool rug
item.description: I am bothered by that awful scissors holder placement. Not only does it ruin the look of the dishwasher, but it also will most likely fall out every time you open the dishwasher door. Not my kitchen, by the way.
item.dc:creator: HelloThere1812

item.title: Done With This F*d Up Timeline
item.description:
This is just the start.
It’s only going to get worse.
“You have no choice. Not your body, not your choice. Your body is mine, and you’re having my baby.” - Conservatives have lied, stolen and cheated to get here. This is what they’ve always wanted.
This is not about being pro-life. It’s about being anti-woman.
What a dystopian nightmare.
America has gone off the cliff of religious theocracy. Thanks, Evangelicals. /s
I’m sorry, Mexico and Canada. Please be willing to rescue those of us who need it.
Exactly.
What a novel idea - mind your own f*cking business.
Hmmmm. Everyone likes a BOGO, right?
Pretty simple to understand.
Vote, vote, vote!
Warrior women. Won’t go down without a fight.
Fight for these rights, or they’ll be coming for yours next.
item.dc:creator: tarptastic

item.title: I fear for young girls who may never again have the services available to them that I did. Were going to have generations of girls who's lives will be ruined.
item.description: I had an abortion at the age of 16, my sister and her husband took me to get an abortion in Kansas City, MO. I went on to finish school, further my education and become a machinists making parts for Boeing. All of that would have been lost to me had the option not been available for me. I felt I had to share my story, put it out there to in some way highlight the importance of Roe vs Wade.
item.dc:creator: Iblamemyparentstoo

item.title: Phone clear dump of random and possibly problematic memes
item.description:
Working in pharmacy be like that
Might just do it anyway at this point
Literally the only thing keeping me going in that place is my two coworkers who are basically this.
Sent this to my husband once. He actually got me cheese. A keeper.
Just turned 30. Definitely wanting that swamp life
Should've cropped it. Oh well.
Been looking for a new job recently. Getting tired of the hoops. I'm not a fucking circus animal. FP EDIT/ holy shit dude okay this was nice to wake up to. To some of the comments. Correct I do not like people ? Glad to have made some people laugh.

item.dc:creator: Tonightat11DOOOOM

item.title: Abortion story times.
item.description: I was not ready for a kid (no shit) at the age of 17. We talked it through, but essentially it was unwanted and we had no means. I’m so happy she did it. I supported her and it was hard as fuck, but I can’t imagine having a kid that young and me being anything more than a high school dropout then AND now. We broke up because we were teenagers and most are not staying together at that age. Can you imagine if we kept it? It’s not a good life for parents or kids. Removing the right to one’s own body is fucked up and I abhor these actions. Viral edit: thank you, I’ve read all the comments and responded to some. Good to know we’re not alone.
item.dc:creator: keppler1647

item.title: hearth care worker memes because ITS NURSES WEEK!
item.description:
National nurses week may 6-12 every year. This week used to be an opportunity for nurses to be shown appreciation for their sacrifices and dedication to nursing. In recent years nurses were hoping for more than pizza parties and pens for our week given how hard we worked to keep the Healthcare system afloat through covid. Now nurses week had been minimized" - having to pay for your "gift" if you get one, businesses like starbucks and Chick-fil-A no longer offer discounts to Healthcare workers during nurses week.
Dilaudid is much stronger than other pain meds and is given IV. People with "drug-seeking" behavior often request this. But lots of people akso truly need this medicine!
Doesn't belong here but I'm too lazy to take it out
Kayexalate is a liquid medicine that treats an elevated potassium level. It works- but itakes the patient shit their brains out. It is more effective and less rough on a patient to give IV dextrose and IV insulin to lower the level but many medical floors cannot give IV insulin.
Top photo: Florence Nightingale, the mother of nursing
Fuck off, shut up, and kick rocks you motherfucking karen-looking dumb shit-spewing cum-guzzling self-rightious piece of shit.
When we need a medication not stocked on our floor we have to request it to be sent from the pharmacy. Almost anywhere you go, it takes forever to get the med you need.
Right before shift-change at 7.
NCLEX is the nationally-standardized exam to get your nursing license. It can bring anyone to tears, it is so hard.
Joint Commission is the governing body thay inspects hospitals. They put up a stink about the most unrealistic things, like using tape on a wall or having a drink with you.
You got this, sweetie! You'll be training someone in a month anyways!
HD- hemodyalisis patient.
Actual picture I took this week. One of my regulars comes in for swallowing unconventional things often- soda cans, pens, light-bulbs, Crack pipes, etc. She does it for attention- she can throw them back up on command whenever feels like it.
Pet tax: Eleanor having a floppy day.
item.dc:creator: MEGALOAF
